rationale: In the citing paper, Goldfarb and Tucker (2011a) appears only as part of broad background referencing prior online advertising research, including grouped citation with Goldfarb and Tucker (2011b). The retargeting study does not directly build its hypotheses, empirical design, or core interpretation on the cited paper's online-offline substitutability framework. The citation functions as general context rather than a distinct, paper-specific contribution to the argument.
